description_long: This clock tower features a compact, octagonal base with three stepped layers, each adorned with a subtle floral pattern. Four slender, cylindrical columns support a large, domed roof that is also decorated with delicate floral motifs, giving the structure an elegant and ornamental appearance. The central section houses a single, octagonal clock face with black hands and a white background, embellished with floral designs and simple, non-numeric hour markers. The clock face is visible only from one side, while the other sides are enclosed by the columns and the back of the clock housing. The materials appear to be a combination of painted or enameled metal for the columns and base, and a fabric or painted surface for the roof. The overall design is reminiscent of a decorative, small-scale public clock tower suitable for parks or plazas.
description: A small, ornate clock tower with a domed floral-patterned roof, four columns, and a single octagonal clock face with decorative floral details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal clock face with floral motifs, supported by four columns and topped with a domed, patterned roof.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the back of the clock housing, with columns and the domed roof but no visible clock face.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid back of the clock housing and the symmetrical arrangement of the columns and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the columns and domed roof without a visible clock face.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is octagonal with a white background, decorated with floral motifs. It features simple, non-numeric hour markers and two black hands. The design is elegant and ornamental, with no Roman or Arabic numerals.
